title: About Me - Perran Moon MP
meta_description: A bit about Perran Moon, Labour MP for Camborne, Redruth and Hayle. (Page still under maintenance so please see @Perran4CRH on FB).
text_excerpt: About Me - Perran Moon MP Skip to main content Hit enter to search or ESC to close Close Search Menu Menu About Me A bit about Perran... My name is Perran Moon, I have been the Member of Parliament for Camborne, Redruth and Hayle since July 2024. I was born and raised in Redruth. My dad was a GP in the local area. Before Parliament, I worked primarily in the Electric Vehicle sector for companies like Renault, Nissan, Autotrader, Manheim, ZapMap and Believ. I also have had experience working in local government prior to my nomination as a candidate in the 2024 general election. © 2026 Perran Moon MP Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy facebook instagram phone email Close Menu Home About Me News Policies Constituency Activity Parliamentary Activity FAQs Gallery Contact facebook instagram phone email
